findings.description: SpecSheetView.js is listed in the component table in s2 content but is absent from the s2 hints array. Users asking about the design view JavaScript UI component by name would not match this section.
findings.source_evidence: 部品一覧に `/js/devtool/SpecSheetView.js — 設計書ビューJavaScriptUI部品` が記載されている。
